metadata.label: Comparison profiles
metadata.note: Profiles are starter cross-reference profiles built from local snapshot values plus refreshed public benchmarks where available.

profiles.label: Public national average
profiles.description: General U.S. reference profile for checking user-entered assumptions against public benchmarks.
profiles.source: Generated from cached public benchmark file and local defaults

profiles.label: St. Louis balanced household
profiles.description: Local balanced spending case close to the current app baseline.
profiles.source: Local captured profile and lifestyle snapshot

profiles.label: Local working profile
profiles.description: Current local household estimate seeded from captured app financial values and public default assumptions.
profiles.source: Captured local app baseline plus cached public benchmark defaults

profiles.label: Conservative planner
profiles.description: Lower return and stronger liquidity profile for stress-aware planning.
profiles.source: Planning profile derived from public benchmark guardrails

profiles.label: High cost metro
profiles.description: Higher income and higher spending profile for checking lifestyle pressure.
profiles.source: Planning profile for high-cost metro scenario comparisons
